episodes.title: First Lady Melania Trump slams 'baseless lies' tying her to Jeffrey Epstein: FULL STATEMENT
episodes.description:
First Lady Melania Trump took a stand against what she described as "baseless lies" that have falsely connected her with sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

In this video, she addresses the media during a news conference that was held on Thursday afternoon.

"The lies linking me with the disgraceful Jeffrey Epstein need to end today," the first lady said.

"The individuals lying about me are devoid of ethical standards: humility and respect," she added. "I do not object to their ignorance, but rather I do drag their mean-spirited attempts to defame my reputation."

The first lady went on to say that she has "never been friends with Epstein or his accomplice, referencing Ghislaine Maxwell. She said she and her husband, President Donald Trump, were invited to the same parties as Epstein and Maxwell.


READ MORE: https://katu.com/news/nation-world/first-lady-melania-trump-slams-baseless-lies-tying-her-to-epstein-sex-offender-ghislaine-maxwell-president-donald-trump-palm-beach-new-york-city

episodes.title: TOP MOMENTS: Must-see moments from Hillary Clinton’s Epstein Files deposition
episodes.description:
The House Oversight Committee released the full depositions of former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton and former President Bill Clinton centered on the committee’s investigation into the Epstein files on Monday.

This video provided by the GOP Oversight Committee focuses on the top moments from Bill Clinton's testimony to lawmakers.

The release of their testimonies come after the pair separately testified before the committee in closed-door meetings last week. The footage shared showed that the couple faced more than four hours of questioning each.

“The American people have a lot of questions. To my knowledge, the Clintons haven't answered very many, if any, questions about their knowledge or involvement with Epstein and Maxwell,” Oversight Committee Chairman James Comer said Thursday before the deposition started.

“No one’s accusing, at this moment, the Clintons of any wrongdoing. They’re going to have due process."

Jeffrey Epstein was found guilty of sex trafficking minors in 2019 and died in prison that same year.
_______________

episodes.title: Full Clinton depositions on Epstein files released after talks with house oversight committee
episodes.description:
The House Oversight Committee released the full depositions of former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton and former President Bill Clinton centered on the committee’s investigation into the Epstein files on Monday.

The release of their testimonies come after the pair separately testified before the committee in closed-door meetings last week. The footage shared showed that the couple faced more than four hours of questioning each.

Hillary maintained that she had never even met Epstein throughout the deposition.

In her opening statement, Hillary accused the committee of using her and her husband as a distraction from President Donald Trump, who is heavily mentioned in the government documents.

READ MORE: https://katu.com/news/nation-world/oversight-committee-posts-full-clinton-depositions-on-epstein-files-after-talks
